title: Regional Economic Analysis
summary: This is a portal page from the Philadelphia Fed listing Third District economic surveys and data products, including the Beige Book, manufacturing and nonmanufacturing outlook surveys, and state coincident indexes. The page functions as an index to resources rather than providing substantive economic analysis or data. No specific macro catalyst events, data releases, or analysis are present in this source.
key_points: Lists Third District Beige Book (qualitative economic assessment) updated 04 Mar '26
Lists Manufacturing Business Outlook Survey updated 19 Mar '26
Lists Nonmanufacturing Business Outlook Survey updated 24 Mar '26
Lists Price and Inflation Expectations Survey updated 25 Feb '26
Lists State Coincident Indexes updated 30 Jan '26
State Leading Indexes release suspended indefinitely due to pandemic impact on jobless claims
why_it_matters: This page is a directory to regional economic data sources that track Third District (PA, NJ, DE) business conditions. The Beige Book and business outlook surveys are inputs to FOMC decision-making, but this source only points to those resources rather than containing the actual analysis or data. This page should not be archived for macro catalyst research.
macro_context: While the listed surveys (Beige Book, business outlook surveys, price expectations) are macro-relevant indicators, this source contains no actual data or analysis. It is merely a catalog of available resources. The actual macro catalysts exist on separate pages and should be archived individually.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE metadata incorrectly says 'article' but content is functionally a listing/navigation page
Source contains only links and brief descriptions of resources, no substantive economic analysis
Content word count of 377 words confirms thin, navigational content
published_at is empty, limiting source provenance and dating
No actual macro catalyst data, events, or analysis present - only catalog of resources
Cannot serve as reliable archive record for macro catalyst research purposes
Per Rule 8: listing pages must not be accepted
Per Rule 9: thin low-signal container pages should bias toward reject

notes: Low-quality source for archival purposes. This is a portal/index page listing regional economic resources rather than containing the resources themselves. The actual macro catalysts (Beige Book releases, survey results, state coincident indexes) exist on separate pages. Recommend identifying and archiving specific survey result pages rather than this navigation hub. Note: State Leading Indexes indefinitely suspended due to pandemic-related methodology issues with jobless claims.
